name: qol-control
author: TyTxexebe
description:
A lot of useful & QoL features
type !qol <cmd?> in chat to get more info

you can change qol-control/settings.json to turn functions on/off which you want by default and not load at all

you can add your mlog codes in qol-control/mlog/ to use them with !mlog

you can add your regex in qol-control/mlog/regex.json to use it in !detector

please give me a star on GitHub :>

discord: @tytxexebe
